title: Eidolons Eval Matrix Arms
description: Consumed by `eidolons eval swe --matrix <arms.json>` (and any suite it runs, e.g. evals/swe-suite.yaml or evals/kupo-keep-suite.yaml via --suite-file). Each arm re-runs the EXISTING single-arm suite path (all tasks x --k) with the arm's fix_hook + env exported, producing one scorecard (schemas/eval-scorecard.schema.json) per arm. Exactly one arm SHOULD carry control:true — the matrix summary's pairwise comparisons (resolved-rate delta, pass^k delta, per-task flips) are computed against it.

label.description: Unique arm identifier. Used verbatim in the stored scorecard filename (evals/results/<date>-<suite>-<label>.scorecard.json) — keep it filename-safe.

fix_hook.description: The edit/LLM step for this arm (passed to `eidolons sandbox loop --fix-hook`). Ignored under --smoke (every arm falls back to the suite's gold_fix so the matrix can validate plumbing without a model).

env.description: Environment variables exported for this arm's run (and inherited by fix_hook/judge_hook subprocesses), e.g. {"EIDOLONS_SANDBOX_MODEL_TIER": "light", "EIDOLONS_EVAL_MODEL": "haiku"}.

control.description: Marks this arm as the baseline the matrix summary's pairwise comparisons are computed against. At most one arm should set this true; the first control:true arm wins if more than one is marked.
